data.name: 一牆之隔的淫聲浪語 ～某一天，隔壁人妻的叫床聲變成妻子的聲音～
data.detailed_description:
故事大綱

岩瀨達也和香織是居住在公寓的一對夫婦。

某一天，隔壁搬來了茅部先生與他的太太。

他們看起來很友善，岩瀨夫婦對新鄰居很放心。

沒想到──

後來的每天晚上，隔壁都會傳來呻吟聲。

由於之前是空房所以沒有注意到，現在才發現原來這棟公寓的牆壁這麼薄。

香豔刺激的聲音擾得夫婦兩人晚上都睡不著。

為了解決連日來的困擾，他們決定去拜訪隔壁鄰居。

本以為噪音問題能夠就此解決，

但是沒想到，這次變成白天就傳來聲音……

登場角色

岩瀨 香織

天見美んと

性格開朗，有點強勢的妻子。

一個禮拜有三天在超市打工。

堅稱肚子上的肉肉是歲月的影響。

過了35歲，想要生小孩，但是對老公說不出口。

岩瀨 達也

有點優柔寡斷，耳根子軟的主角。

在中小企業上班，是個薪水不高的上班族。

性格溫和親切，總是盡量避免與人起紛爭。

但偶爾也會做出有男子氣概的行動……？

茅部 結奈

花寺香蓮

楚楚可憐系的騷貨妻子。

搬來隔壁的茅部萬藏的太太。

看起來乖巧溫柔，實際上性慾很強。

在特種行業工作，是家裡的經濟來源。

茅部 萬藏

胖胖的體型以及友善的外貌，給人謙遜有禮的感覺。

實際上性慾很強，而且性器巨大。

是個吃軟飯的丈夫，似乎也沒有工作……

data.short_description: ANIM出品的愛情視覺小說，本作品採用E-mote動畫立繪！岩瀨達也和香織是居住在公寓的一對夫婦。自從隔壁搬來了茅部先生與他的太太，原本平靜的生活開始被每天晚上傳來的噪音打擾……
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Core2Duo 2.4GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4.5 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Wife’s Voice Is Cumming Through the Wall
data.detailed_description:
STORY

Tatsuya and Kaori Iwase are happily spending the day in their apartment when a new married couple moves into the apartment next door. The Kayabes seem like nice people, which puts the Iwases at ease.

However, they soon come to realize just how thin their apartment walls are. Night after night, they are subjected to the panting, moaning, and seductive voices coming from the Kayabes’ apartment.

After tiring of putting up with the noise, the Iwases confront their neighbors and the nightly disturbances cease... only for them to almost immediately start up again, but now during the day.

FEATURES

  • An erotic visual novel

  • Japanese voice acting

  • E-mote animated character sprites

CHARACTERS

Kaori Iwase

Mint Amami

Lively and strong-willed, Mrs. Iwase works at a supermarket three days a week. She likes to believe that her gaining weight is all down to her growing older. Now that she’s in her late thirties, she’s been thinking about having children but hasn’t been able to tell her husband.

Tatsuya Iwase

A bit indecisive and easily swayed, Mr. Iwase works for peanuts at a mid-sized company in their sales department. Mild-mannered and affable, he prefers to avoid conflict. But when push comes to shove, will he grow a backbone?

Yuuna Kayabe

Karen Hanadera

Mrs. Kayabe has a calm and gentle way about her that runs counter to her voracious sexual appetite. She’s the breadwinner for her family and works nights.

Manzou Kayabe

On the outside, Mr. Kayabe seems like a stout, good-natured, and humble man. In reality, he’s a shitty husband who doesn’t seem to have a job and is just as horny—if not more so—as his wife with a big dick to match.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Core2Duo 2.4GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Storage: 4.5 GB available space
